scope: panel, view system (emPanel, emView, emViewAnimator, emViewInputFilter, emSubViewPanel)

items.notes: Decomposed: tree node data in PanelTree (SlotMap), behavior in trait, read-only state snapshot in PanelState
Rust uses PanelId parent param + PanelCtx for tree mutation
C++ cross-pointer mechanism; Rust uses PanelId (slotmap key) instead
Rust architecture separates View from PanelTree; no per-panel view reference
C++ emContext hierarchy not replicated in Rust
C++ emContext hierarchy not replicated
Shortcut to view.GetWindow(); Rust ZuiWindow is separate
Shortcut to view.GetScreen(); Rust has no emScreen equivalent
Constant 1.0; Rust does not have a dedicated getter (layout_rect provides actual dimensions)
Pixel tallness concept not needed in Rust (assumes square pixels)
On view rather than per-panel (same semantics)
C++ emEngine::Cycle mechanism not replicated; Rust uses scheduler signals
Rust signature differs: no mx/my params (mouse coords in InputState)
Rust has auto_expand() returning bool (whether to expand), not the action itself; expansion logic is in tree.rs
Rust has auto_shrink() returning bool; expansion/shrink mechanism differs
Most flags mapped; VF_EGO_MODE and VF_STRESS_TEST not ported
C++ signal mechanism not replicated in Rust
Field exists but no dedicated setter method; set directly
C++ signal mechanism
C++ signal mechanism
C++ signal mechanism
Rust ZuiWindow is separate; no view→window lookup
No emScreen equivalent in Rust
Home geometry for popup-zoom; popup-zoom feature not implemented
Rust has viewport dimensions but no absolute screen position or pixel tallness
C++ signal mechanism
Popup-zoom feature not implemented
Rust VIFs are not a linked list on View; they're managed separately in ZuiWindow
SVP concept exists internally in update_viewing but no public getter
No identity-based panel lookup on View; VisitingViewAnimator walks the identity path internally

items.rust_equivalent: View::visit_stack() (top of stack is visited panel)
items.notes: Visit state stored in stack rather than single panel pointer
Identity-based visiting goes through the animator
Rust visit() is immediate; animation done through animator
Auto-coordinate raw visit partially covered by visit_fullsized
Popup-zoom feature not implemented
End-Of-Interaction signal not implemented
End-Of-Interaction signal not implemented
View-level touch priority not exposed; PanelTree has per-panel version
No active animator getter on View; animators managed by ZuiWindow
Managed at ZuiWindow level, not on View
Managed at ZuiWindow level

items.rust_equivalent: View dispatches input to panels in ZuiWindow
items.notes: Input dispatch exists but architecture differs significantly
Cursor aggregation done differently in Rust
SVP selection logic exists in update_viewing but not as a separate public/private method
Popup-zoom viewport swap not implemented
Input recursion exists but structured differently in Rust
View focus managed via view_focused field, set externally by ZuiWindow
C++ emEngine Cycle pattern; Rust drives updates from ZuiWindow event loop
EOI signal not implemented
Rust ZuiWindow integrates view port functionality directly
Focus request goes through winit directly
Functionality exists but in ZuiWindow rather than ViewPort
View passed as &mut to animate(); no stored reference
Master/slave hierarchy not replicated; animators are standalone
Only stop(); activation is implicit by setting velocity/goal
Animator input handled at VIF level
Animator paint overlay not implemented
Painting invalidation handled at View level
Target velocity is set but no public getter

items.rust_equivalent: SpeedingViewAnimator target_velocity field + VIF sets it

items.notes: No public getter for spring extension magnitude
Distance calculation exists internally but may differ in structure
S-curve path computation exists but may use different data structures
Visiting animator input/paint overlay (seek info box) not ported
No linked-list traversal; VIFs stored in Vec in ZuiWindow
Forwarding done by returning false from filter() (event not consumed)
Mouse pointer warping not implemented
Rust inlines spring physics rather than using SwipingViewAnimator instances
Programmatic navigation not ported
Cheat code VIF not implemented
Sub-view panel (panel containing a nested emView) not implemented

emPanel.notes: Nearly complete. Missing: GetView/GetViewContext/GetRootContext (architecture difference), GetWindow/GetScreen (separate in Rust), GetWidth (constant 1.0), Cycle (engine pattern), LinkCrossPtr (uses PanelId). AutoExpand/AutoShrink ambiguous (bool vs action).

emView.notes: Core navigation/zoom/scroll ported. Not ported: popup-zoom features (Home/Current geometry, IsPoppedUp, SwapViewPorts, GetMaxPopupViewRect), signal mechanism (6 signals), EOI, SoftKeyboard, StressTest, EgoMode, GetCursor, DoCustomCheat, GetSupremeViewedPanel (no getter), GetPanelByIdentity.

emViewPort.notes: ViewPort as a class not ported; functionality absorbed into View + ZuiWindow.

emViewAnimator.notes: Core trait and CycleAnimation ported. Not ported: master/slave hierarchy, deactivate-when-idle, Input/Paint overlays.

emSpeedingViewAnimator.notes: Fully ported except target velocity getter (ambiguous).

emVisitingViewAnimator.notes: Nearly complete. Input/Paint overlay (seek info box) not ported. CurvePoint data structure ambiguous.

emViewInputFilter.notes: Core filter trait ported. Linked-list traversal (Prev/Next), touch priority, and forward methods not applicable (Rust uses Vec).

emCheatVIF.notes: Cheat code VIF not implemented at all.

emDefaultTouchVIF.notes: Touch event priority method not ported.
